name: Scalar — Web Form Lead Capture + AI Response (Supabase)

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": true, "message": "Thank you! We will be in touch shortly." }

nodes.name: Upsert Contact (Supabase)

body.jsonOutput: ={{ JSON.stringify({ phone: $json.phone || undefined, email: $json.email || undefined, name: $json.fullName, first_name: $json.firstName, last_name: $json.lastName, source: $json.source, tags: ['webform', $json.isBusinessHours ? 'business-hours' : 'after-hours'] }) }}

nodes._notes: Upsert matches on phone (UNIQUE). If phone is empty and only email exists, will insert a new row — consider adding email to the unique index if needed.

body.jsonOutput: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contact_id: $('Upsert Contact (Supabase)').first().json[0]?.id, status: 'new', channel: 'webform', service_interest: $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.service, preferred_time: $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.preferredTime, booking_data: { message: $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.message, submittedAt: $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.submittedAt, isBusinessHours: $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.isBusinessHours }, notes: $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.message }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ contact_id: $('Upsert Contact (Supabase)').first().json[0]?.id, channel: 'webform', direction: 'inbound', content: $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.message || '[No message]', metadata: { service: $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.service, preferredTime: $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.preferredTime, source: $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.source }, ai_handled: false }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are writing a professional, warm email response on behalf of a Hong Kong med-aesthetics clinic.

The email should:
1. Thank them for their enquiry
2. Briefly acknowledge their interest in the specified service
3. Let them know a team member will be in contact within 1 business day to discuss and schedule a consultation
4. Mention clinic hours: Mon–Sat 9am–7pm HKT

Keep it under 150 words. Do not quote prices. Sign off as "The Clinic Team". Write in the same language the enquiry was made in (default English).' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Client name: ' + $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.fullName + '
Service interest: ' + $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.service + '
Message: ' + ($('Extract Form Fields').first().json.message || 'No message provided') + '
Preferred time: ' + ($('Extract Form Fields').first().json.preferredTime || 'Not specified') + '
Submitted: ' + ($('Extract Form Fields').first().json.isBusinessHours ? 'During business hours' : 'After hours') }], max_tokens: 300, temperature: 0.6 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'The Clinic Team <noreply@yourclinic.hk>', to: [$json.email], subject: $json.emailSubject, html: $json.htmlBody }) }}

parameters._notes: Domain must be verified in Resend dashboard. Update 'from' address to match your verified domain. Resend free tier: 100 emails/day, 3,000/month.

body.jsonOutput: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messageText: 'Hi ' + $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.firstName + '! 👋 Thank you for reaching out about ' + $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.service + '. We have received your enquiry and a team member will be in touch within 1 business day to schedule your consultation.\n\nClinic hours: Mon–Sat, 9am–7pm.' }) }}

parameters._notes: This will only work if the customer has messaged your WhatsApp number first (within 24h). For new contacts who haven't initiated, use sendTemplateMessage with an approved opt-in template.

body.jsonOutput: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contact_id: $('Extract Email Body').first().json.contactId, channel: 'email', direction: 'outbound', content: $('Extract Email Body').first().json.emailBody, metadata: { subject: $('Extract Email Body').first().json.emailSubject, sentVia: 'resend', ai_generated: true }, ai_handled: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: ':page_facing_up: *New web form lead*
*Name:* ' + $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.fullName + '
*Service:* ' + $('Extract Form Fields').first().json.service + '
*Email:* ' + ($('Extract Form Fields').first().json.email || 'n/a') + '
*Phone:* ' + ($('Extract Form Fields').first().json.phone || 'n/a') + '
*Message:* ' + ($('Extract Form Fields').first().json.message || 'None') + '
*Timing:* ' + ($('Extract Form Fields').first().json.isBusinessHours ? 'Business hours' : 'After hours') }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Insert Lead (Supabase)').first().json[0]?.id, contact_id: $('Upsert Contact (Supabase)').first().json[0]?.id, client_name: $('CRM Adapter').first().json.CLIENT_NAME, payload: $('CRM Adapter').first().json.crmPayload, endpoint: $('CRM Adapter').first().json.CLIENT_CRM_ENDPOINT, response_code: $('Send to Client CRM').first().json.statusCode || 0, success: ($('Send to Client CRM').first().json.statusCode >= 200 && $('Send to Client CRM').first().json.statusCode < 300) }) }}

_meta.notes: SETUP CHECKLIST: (1) Set 'Web Form Webhook' URL in demo-booking-form.html (N8N_WEBHOOK_URL constant). (2) Create Resend account → verify domain → create API key → create credential 'Resend API Key' (httpHeaderAuth, header: Authorization, value: Bearer re_xxxxx). Update 'from' address in Send Email node. (3) Replace YOUR_WATI_TENANT_ID in Send WhatsApp node URL. (4) Replace YOUR_SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY in all Authorization headers. (5) Replace YOUR_SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL. (6) Replace YOUR_CLIENT_CRM_WEBHOOK_URL in CRM Adapter node. (7) GHL is fully removed — contact+lead data lives in Supabase, email via Resend, notifications via Slack.
